prompt: App icon on pure black background. Bold flat vector design. Two crab claws forming eyeglasses - left claw curves into the left lens frame, right claw curves into the right lens frame, connected at a center bridge. The claws are exaggerated with pointed pincer tips, clearly recognizable as crab claws. Inside the left lens: a bold right-pointing chevron/greater-than symbol '>'. Inside the right lens: a bold horizontal dash/bar '—' (a thick horizontal line, like a cursor). Both symbols are centered in their respective lenses. Uniform thick stroke weight for everything - frame, claws, and symbols all the same thickness. Neon green (#00FF41) on pure black. Minimal tight glow, not a big bloom. Flat vector style, no gradients, no 3D. Clean and iconic, must read clearly at 48px app icon size.
